item.name: Ultimoat Carp
item.description:
In Alexandria, this impressive fish could once be seen feeding on the vegetation that flourished in the castle moat.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This large wavekin was once a domineering presence in Alexandria's castle moat. When the realm was reborn as Proto Alexandria, the few remaining carp also found themselves enjoying a new lease on life.
